data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the acceptance actor/timestamp trail.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for an 'Acceptance actor/timestamp trail'. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly demonstrate that this requirement is being tracked or managed within the system. The prior steps do not include any checks or validations that confirm the implementation of this trail, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming the implementation of acceptance actor/timestamp trail.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
